review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Review only the provided diff. Never say you need to inspect files or run commands. Output the final verdict in the requested JSON-compatible structure." --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-075-review-prompt.txt > /tmp/cp00-075-claude-review-output.json

findings.title: The policy-level true-flag assertion loop omits a few declared no-write guard flags (doesNotGenerateGoldenFixture, doesNotPersistGoldenFixture, doesNotWriteGoldenCatalog, doesNotWriteUnitTestContract, doesNotWriteReviewAssignment, doesNotWriteReviewNotification). These are set true in the policy/module but not re-asserted at the policy layer.
findings.details: Defense-in-depth only. No safety exposure: the assembler hardcodes the corresponding result flags (golden_fixture_generation_permitted, golden_catalog_write_permitted, unit_test_contract_write_permitted, review_assignment_write_permitted, review_notification_permitted, etc.) to false, and assertControlPlanePermissionAuditSyntheticFixtureDecisionBindingResult enforces them false. Optional hardening.
findings.recommendation: Assert all policy-level no-write guard flags that are declared true.

findings.title: Result shape carries heavy redundancy: per-decision *_ref strings plus full nested objects plus both the aggregate synthetic_decision_bindings/synthetic_audit_bindings arrays and the individual synthetic_view/search/.../matched_rule_capture singletons.
findings.details: Cosmetic/maintainability only; consistent with the established CP00-07x pattern. Increases drift surface but is fully covered by deep-equal validators.
findings.recommendation: Keep established CP00-07x redundant mirror shape unless a later consolidation pack refactors the family consistently.

residual_risks: Low. CP00-075 is metadata-only and forward-looking; runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ evaluator calls, security trimming execution, audit event writes, review queue writes, fixture/test/golden generation, database/storage/idempotency/lock/product-state writes, and LDIP implementation remain explicitly prohibited.
The remaining P3 is a maintainability note about redundant mirror shape and is covered by contract/fixture/policy deep equality tests.
parsed_review.overall_summary: CP00-075 covers planned 10 Risk-A units RP00.P06.M05.S20-RP00.P06.M06.S09, consumes CP00-074 interaction proof, closes the M05 denied-test contract, starts M06 synthetic fixture permission/audit matrix and decision bindings, and preserves no-write/fail-closed/LDIP-planning-only boundaries.

raw_result.result_excerpt: Verdict APPROVE. P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=2. Blocking findings none. Required fixes none.
